rulings.Case Title: TANYA PHILLIPS VS. ELEANOR GAUSE et al
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 03, 2015 line 1. PLAINTIFF TANYA PHILLIPS's Motion for Leave to Amend Complaint DENIED. Moving party failed to meet the requirements of CRC 3.1324 and CCP 473(b).= (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: CHARLENE FINLEY VS. SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 03, 2015 line 2. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO HOUSING AUTHORITY's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT continued to August 17, 2015 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: HOWARD L WESTON AS TRUSTEE OF THE HOWAR L WESTON VS. MIMI LAY
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 03, 2015 line 3. DEFENDANTS MIMI LAY, WILLIAM LAY and DAW THAN's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT sustained in part and overruled in part. Demurrer is sustained with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege the correct date of termination of tenancy. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GOLDEN PROPERTIES, LLC. VS. MARIA PONFERRADA-TANEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 03, 2015 line 4. DEFENDANT MARIA PONFERRADA's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD GRANTED. Moving party to provide properly filled out order including defendant's address and the date of the next hearing/proceeding. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NADINE CAZATT VS. ROMEO ARAMBULA ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Monday, August 03, 2015 line 5. DEFENDANT ROMEO ARAMBULA's Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Default Judgment GRANTED, subject to opposition. Defendant shall file answer and post $8,400 with the Court no later than August 4, 2015 by 4:00 p.m. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: WILLIAM PENN HOTEL LP VS. MIRIAM ABIGAIL GALLUS ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion, Motion, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities And Declaration In Support Of Motion To Vacate Default And Judgment
